시편 77:1.content: My cry goes to God! Indeed, I cry to God for help, and for him to listen to me.

시편 77:2.content: In the day of my trouble I sought the Lord. My hand was stretched out in the night, and didn’t get tired. My soul refused to be comforted.

시편 77:3.content: I remember God, and I groan. I complain, and my spirit is overwhelmed.

시편 77:4.content: You hold my eyelids open. I am so troubled that I can’t speak.

시편 77:5.content: I have considered the days of old, the years of ancient times.

시편 77:6.content: I remember my song in the night. I consider in my own heart; my spirit diligently inquires:

시편 77:7.content: “Will the Lord reject us forever? Will he be favorable no more?

시편 77:8.content: Has his loving kindness vanished forever? Does his promise fail for generations?

시편 77:9.content: Has God forgotten to be gracious? Has he, in anger, withheld his compassion?”

시편 77:10.content: Then I thought, “I will appeal to this: the years of the right hand of the Most High.”

시편 77:11.content: I will remember Yah’s deeds; for I will remember your wonders of old.

시편 77:12.content: I will also meditate on all your work, and consider your doings.

시편 77:13.content: Your way, God, is in the sanctuary. What god is great like God?

시편 77:14.content: You are the God who does wonders. You have made your strength known among the peoples.

시편 77:15.content: You have redeemed your people with your arm, the sons of Jacob and Joseph.

시편 77:16.content: The waters saw you, God. The waters saw you, and they writhed. The depths also convulsed.

시편 77:17.content: The clouds poured out water. The skies resounded with thunder. Your arrows also flashed around.

시편 77:18.content: The voice of your thunder was in the whirlwind. The lightnings lit up the world. The earth trembled and shook.

시편 77:19.content: Your way was through the sea; your paths through the great waters. Your footsteps were not known.

시편 77:20.content: You led your people like a flock, by the hand of Moses and Aaron.
